race.description: Ladbrokes Inter Dominion Trotting Champs R2 Ht2 (L)
race.comment: KEAYANG STUKA (10) ran into series favourite Gus in the opening round of heats and did well to come from this row for third. Headed north off a win at Melton, beating Rockinwithattitude who franked the form with a dead heat win last week. He is a former Inter Dominion Final placegetter and is up to winning this if things go his way. LOVEMETO NZ (5) produced an uncharacteristic break last week so manners are a concern but he had put together a string of wins and placings in Victoria prior so is going well enough to win this if he gets it right. GOLDEN SUNSET (8) won a heat of this series at odds last year and draws for a trail so she is a first four player along with ALDEBARANSTILINSKI (6) who was far from disgraced from the back row last week and had been consistent prior.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 Ladbrokes QLD Constellations Carnival - Prize Money: $30,000
